items.title: Server-side submission validation
items.notes: BUG-001 — validate-answers.ts + submissions router.

items.title: Rate limit public endpoints
items.notes: SEC-001, SEC-002 — in-memory rate-limit.ts on submit + track.

items.title: Transactional submission + lead insert
items.notes: BUG-002 — db.transaction in submissions router.

items.title: Everest design system + UI revamp
items.notes: Mauve/everest-green/gold tokens, Panel/PageHeader/EmptyState, admin sidebar, public form hero.

items.title: Visual form builder
items.notes: Replace JSON editor with drag-and-drop field blocks (@dnd-kit).

items.title: Embeddable forms
items.notes: iframe / script embed for landing pages.

items.title: CRM & Slack webhooks
items.notes: Extend Inngest handler to notify external systems on new leads.

items.title: Conditional field logic
items.notes: Show/skip fields based on prior answers.

items.title: Analytics charts
items.notes: Funnel visualization and drop-off heatmap in admin.

items.title: Admin user provisioning
items.notes: CLI or internal flow to invite Everest staff (sign-up disabled).

items.title: Client-side auth redirect guard
items.notes: Fixed: sign-out + router.invalidate() to /login; admin layout useEffect watches session.

items.title: Checkbox field renders as text input
items.notes: FieldInput has no checkbox branch; users must type 'true'/'false'.

items.title: field_answered fires per keystroke
items.notes: Should fire on blur/debounce; inflates drop-off, hammers DB, risks rate-limit rejections.

items.title: form_started fires on mount instead of interaction
items.notes: Sent together with form_viewed on mount → starts≈views, completion rate meaningless.

items.title: Versioned form definitions / submission snapshot
items.notes: Old submissions become unreadable after edits; store definition version with submission.

items.title: Editor: save feedback, error surfacing, unsaved-changes guard
items.notes: No toast on save success, mutation errors not surfaced, no beforeUnload guard.

items.title: Slug change breaks live links
items.notes: Editing published slug 404s shared links; needs redirect table or warning.

items.title: Duplicate submission protection
items.notes: No uniqueness on (formId, sessionId); back-button or retry creates dupes.

items.title: Spam protection (honeypot / captcha)
items.notes: Rate limit alone won't stop bots filling lead pipelines.

items.title: Partial submissions capture
items.notes: Track field events but discard answers on abandon; high-value for lead gen.

items.title: Submission detail view + CSV export
items.notes: listSubmissions capped at 100, no pagination; no UI to browse answers or export.

items.title: Lead detail view, notes, assignment
items.notes: Leads list capped at 200 with no pagination/search; no notes or owner assignment.

items.title: Rate limiter bucket memory leak
items.notes: Expired buckets never evicted from Map; grows unboundedly per-IP-per-form.

items.title: Client-side format validation per page
items.notes: validateCurrentPage only checks required; email/date errors surface on final submit.

items.title: GDPR/consent checkbox + privacy notice
items.notes: Collecting PII with UTM tracking; no consent field in definition schema.
